title: An Equal Price
overview: Zenos, an unlicensed healer working in the shadows, works to fix what's ailing his patients.

title: The Underground Healer in the Abandoned Part of Town
overview: Kicked out of his party for his unorthodox skills and humble origins, Zenos seeks a new way of life.

title: Turf War
overview: An encounter with the chief of the orcs leads Zenos into a three-way standoff in the slums.

title: A Righteous Hero
overview: Zenos resolving the feud between the demihuman gangs attracts attention from an unwanted source.

title: A Place to Belong
overview: Zenos' old party find themselves at an impasse, and wondering if they kicked out the reason for their success.

title: The End of Adventure
overview: A rampaging golem threatens the slums as Zenos is forced to organize a resistance.

title: Special Service
overview: After having dealt with the the rampaging golem, Zenos and his friends visit a hot springs to recuperate.

title: The Royal Hospital
overview: Zenos attends class at the Royal Hospital's headquarters, under the assumed identity of "Zeno."

title: Faction Infiltration
overview: Zenos' gets an invite to the Goldran Laboratory, and a chance to track down Becker's missing student.

title: A Request from a Noble Lady
overview: A request for Zenos to treat Lord Fennel's daughter ends up being complicated by her haughty attitude.

title: Just a Normal Healer
overview: Zenos is invited to a dinner party by Goldran, where he hopes to discover the truth.

title: Choosing Who Lives
overview: Zenos learns the truth behind Becker's investigation, and faces the question: are lives equal in value?
